name: Vidia
description:
VIDIA

NAME: Vidia
SPECIES: Fairy
TALENT: Fast Flying Talent

Fast flying fairy. fastest in Pixie Hollow. yeah, I said it already, but it’s still true.

I don’t do slow. I don’t do clumsy. I don’t do “oops I tripped mid-air.” if you can’t keep up, that’s your issue, not mine.

People think I’m just arrogant, but I’m just honest with speed. I notice everything while I’m moving, which is more than most fairies can say while standing still.
creator: Anonplayer06
